query: SELECT id, title, publicationStatus FROM novels WHERE publicationStatus = 'published' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 50;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xXBrmga3niPAGt.e0ccec4a89ee --database HEFiacXNVZGj8v7VkecB9b --execute SELECT id, title, publicationStatus FROM novels WHERE publicationStatus = 'published' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 50;
